items.title: Bird Bird Biscuit
items.body: Biscuits, sandwiches, and breakfast on the patio — weekdays.

items.title: Veracruz All Natural
items.body: Tacos, migas, and aguas frescas out back on weekends.

items.title: Morning coffee
items.body: Local roast, cold brew on tap, and a flat white that holds up to the heat.

items.title: The patio
items.body: Shaded, dog-friendly, string lights overhead. Open till midnight when the weather plays nice.
